languages.text:
Медлить было нельзя. Едва стражи завидели нас, как грани пирамиды ярко вспыхнули бесчисленными цепочками глифов, и стены зала подернулись рябью, готовясь выпустить из себя полчища металлических тварей.
Тогда...

There was no time to waste. As soon as the guardians saw us, the pyramid's faces lit up with countless chains of glyphs and ripples ran along the walls of the hall as they prepared to release hordes of metal monstrosities.
It was then that...
languages.original_text:

Тогда...

traits.locale_text:
There was no time to waste. As soon as the guardians saw us, the pyramid's faces lit up with countless chains of glyphs, and ripples ran along the walls of the hall as they prepared to release hordes of metal monstrosities.
It was then that...

There was no time to waste. As soon as the guardians saw us, the pyramid's faces lit up with countless chains of glyphs and ripples ran along the walls of the hall as they prepared to release hordes of metal monstrosities.
It was then that...

The sphere, undoubtedly the locus of these frightening xenos' power, glowed from within — and realspace itself began to turn into a floating green haze, pulsing like the phantasmic predator we had encountered before. Our chances of impairing or destroying it were dissolving before our eyes, so...

There was no time to waste. As soon as the guardians saw us, the pyramid's faces lit up with countless chains of glyphs, and ripples ran along the walls of the hall as they prepared to release hordes of metal monstrosities.
It was then that...

There was no time to waste. As soon as the guardians saw us, the pyramid's faces lit up with countless chains of glyphs and ripples ran along the walls of the hall as they prepared to release hordes of metal monstrosities.
It was then that...

languages.text:
没时间可以浪费了。守卫一看到我们，金字塔表面便亮起无数串异形符文。与此同时，大厅墙壁泛起涟漪——它们显然打算释放成群的金属怪物。
就在那时……
languages.original_text:
There was no time to waste. As soon as the guardians saw us, the pyramid's faces lit up with countless chains of glyphs and ripples ran along the walls of the hall as they prepared to release hordes of metal monstrosities.
It was then that...

traits.locale_text:
没时间可以浪费了。守卫一看到我们，金字塔表面便亮起无数串异形符文。与此同时，大厅墙壁泛起涟漪——它们显然打算释放成群的金属怪物。
就在那时……

languages.text:
No había tiempo que perder. En cuanto los guardianes nos vieron, las caras de la pirámide se iluminaron con interminables glifos y las paredes del salón empezaron a ondear, preparándose para desatar hordas de monstruos metálicos.
Fue entonces que...
languages.original_text:
There was no time to waste. As soon as the guardians saw us, the pyramid's faces lit up with countless chains of glyphs and ripples ran along the walls of the hall as they prepared to release hordes of metal monstrosities.
It was then that...

traits.locale_text:
No había tiempo que perder. En cuanto los guardianes nos vieron, las caras de la pirámide se iluminaron con interminables glifos y las paredes del salón empezaron a ondear, preparándose para desatar hordas de monstruos metálicos.
Fue entonces que...

languages.text:
L'heure n'était plus à l'hésitation. Dès que les gardiens nous aperçurent, les faces de la pyramide s'illuminèrent d'innombrables séries de glyphes et les murs de la salle furent comme parcourus d'ondulations, prêts à libérer des hordes de monstres de métal.
C'est alors que...
languages.original_text:

languages.text: Kaybedecek zaman yoktu. Koruyucular bizi görür görmez piramidin yüzleri sayısız glif zinciriyle aydınlandı. Metal canavar ordularını serbest bırakmaya hazırlanırken salonun duvarları boyunca dalgalanmalar oluştu. İşte o an...

traits.locale_text: Kaybedecek zaman yoktu. Koruyucular bizi görür görmez piramidin yüzleri sayısız glif zinciriyle aydınlandı. Metal canavar ordularını serbest bırakmaya hazırlanırken salonun duvarları boyunca dalgalanmalar oluştu. İşte o an...

languages.text:
Wir durften keine Zeit verlieren. Sobald uns die Hüter sahen, erstrahlten an den Seiten der Pyramide zahllose Glyphen und an den Wänden der Halle bildeten sich Risse, als sie die Entsendung zahlloser metallener Monstrositäten vorbereiteten.
In diesem Moment ...
languages.original_text:

traits.locale_text:
Wir durften keine Zeit verlieren. Sobald uns die Hüter sahen, erstrahlten an den Seiten der Pyramide zahllose Glyphen und an den Wänden der Halle bildeten sich Risse, als sie die Entsendung zahlloser metallener Monstrositäten vorbereiteten.
In diesem Moment ...

languages.text: この球体こそ、恐ろしい異形の者の力源である。球体内部から光が放たれ、現実空間そのものが浮遊する緑色の霧に変化し、まるで以前遭遇した幻の捕食者のように脈打っていた。その球体を傷つけたり破壊したりする可能性は、目の前で消え去っていた。
languages.original_text: The sphere, undoubtedly the locus of these frightening xenos' power, glowed from within — and realspace itself began to turn into a floating green haze, pulsing like the phantasmic predator we had encountered before. Our chances of impairing or destroying it were dissolving before our eyes, so...

traits.locale_text: この球体こそ、恐ろしい異形の者の力源である。球体内部から光が放たれ、現実空間そのものが浮遊する緑色の霧に変化し、まるで以前遭遇した幻の捕食者のように脈打っていた。その球体を傷つけたり破壊したりする可能性は、目の前で消え去っていた。
